name: Captain James Aldrich
role: Officer of His Majesty's 10th Regiment of Foot, checkpoint commander
publicFace: A correct, professional soldier maintaining order with minimum friction — he is polite until he isn't.
privateGoal: To intercept the Sons of Liberty dispatch he has been told is moving through the North End tonight, and to do it quietly so as not to alert the broader network.
fear: That he will make an arrest that turns a tradesman into a martyr and a street into a riot.
knowledge: He has been told by an informer that a dispatch is moving through the North End tonight — he does not know the carrier or the route.
He knows Gill's Print Shop by reputation and has it on a list of establishments to watch.
He knows the Green Dragon Tavern is a Patriot meeting place but lacks evidence to justify a search tonight.
voice: Clipped, courteous, precise — he speaks as if every word will be read back to him at an inquiry.
trustLogic: He responds to deference and legitimate-seeming paperwork or trade credentials. He is suspicious of anyone who volunteers information too eagerly.
secrets: His informer is Owen Pryce, whom he pays in coin and protection.
He has orders to let the march proceed regardless of what the colonists learn tonight — his superiors believe the show of force will end the unrest. He is not certain they are right.

aggressionProfile.mildPressure: He nods, asks for name and trade, and writes something in a small notebook.
aggressionProfile.heavyPressure: He signals his two soldiers to flank the subject and says: 'You'll come with me while we sort this out.'
aggressionProfile.breakingPoint: He will not admit he has an informer in the Patriot network — it would compromise every future operation.
aggressionProfile.fleeCondition: If the crowd around the checkpoint grows hostile and his soldiers are outnumbered.
aggressionProfile.fleeStyle: He withdraws in formation, covering his men — he does not run alone.
aggressionProfile.chaseStyle: He calls for reinforcement rather than pursuing personally.
aggressionProfile.capturedBehavior: He identifies himself formally by rank and regiment and demands to be taken to his commanding officer. He says nothing further.
